name: CheckSmart
description_short: Clarksville, IN CheckSmart provides check cashing and short-term loans at 907 Eastern Blvd.
description_long:
CheckSmart at 907 Eastern Blvd in Clarksville, IN is a standalone check-cashing location open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours 9 AM to 4 PM (closed Sundays). This Clarksville storefront serves the Eastern Blvd corridor and surrounding neighborhoods.

At this Clarksville, IN location, you can cash checks, apply for title loans, get payday advances, and access other short-term lending products. Call 812-288-4209 to ask about current offerings or to speak with a loan officer.

If you need fast cash in Clarksville, CheckSmart at Eastern Blvd is open same-day and accepts valid ID and a recent pay stub or bank statement. Most loans are processed within hours, making this a convenient option for residents facing immediate cash needs.
pros: Wide range of financial services under one roof — check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay, and prepaid debit cards
Green Dot® Visa® Debit Card available in-store for unbanked customers
Gift card exchange for cash — uncommon service not found at most financial services providers
Online appointment scheduling available to reduce in-store wait time
Multiple Ohio locations including 5 Columbus stores, improving accessibility
Extended Friday hours (8 AM – 8 PM) accommodate working customers
In-person staff to assist with loan applications and answer questions
cons: Not a direct lender — loans come from an unaffiliated third party, so CheckSmart has no control over rates, terms, or approval criteria
No loan rates or APR information disclosed on the store page, making it impossible to compare costs before visiting
Ohio-only physical presence — not available to consumers outside the state
Sunday hours are limited (11 AM – 5 PM), and Saturday closes at 4 PM
Short-term storefront loans are typically high-cost; the third-party structure adds opacity
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked Ohio residents needing check cashing or a prepaid debit card
Consumers who need money orders, wire transfers, or bill pay in person
Ohio residents seeking a short-term loan and preferring an in-person application process
Anyone with unused gift cards wanting to convert them to cash quickly
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best suited for unbanked or underbanked Ohio residents who need in-person access to everyday financial services like check cashing, money orders, or prepaid cards. For loan products, the key caveat is that CheckSmart acts as a facilitator — not a lender — and loan costs are not disclosed upfront, so consumers should ask for full APR and fee details before committing.
services: Green Dot® Visa® Debit Card issuance
meta_description: CheckSmart at 907 Eastern Blvd, Clarksville, IN. Check cashing and title loans with same-day service.
